name: Security Sentry Bar
description: Build, install, or refine a local-first macOS security monitor for SwiftBar/XBar that summarizes network connections, listening ports, LaunchAgents, unusual processes, and recent file changes from the menu bar without hidden network feeds.
short_description: SwiftBar host-security monitor for ports, agents, processes, and recent file changes
default_prompt: Use $security-sentry-bar to install or refine a local SwiftBar security monitor with network, port, LaunchAgent, process, and recent-file checks.
audience: Mac users who want quick local security posture checks
SwiftBar and XBar users who prefer transparent shell plugins
Builders prototyping native menu-bar security utilities
detail_lines: Shows green, yellow, or red menu-bar posture based on local checks every 60 seconds.
Surfaces established connections, listening ports, LaunchAgent changes, unusual process paths, and recent file changes without requiring root.
Supports an explicit full-scan action and local CIDR watchlists without hidden remote threat feeds.
